caption: A person works on a craft project on a white gridded cutting mat. On the mat are several small rectangles of olive green patterned paper with yellow and white accents, a white piece of cardstock, and various craft supplies. These include a stamp set with the words "BIRTHDAY" and "Best things", a clear stamp block labeled "Thank You", and a white ink pad branded "MEMENTO". Across the sequence, the patterned paper pieces are shifted and rearranged. In the beginning, a group of patterned rectangles sits on the left, while smaller strips are near the center. As the action progresses, the larger group of patterned paper is moved toward the center, and a small white slip of paper is slid underneath the ink pad. The person's hands are mostly off-screen, though a small portion of a hand appears at the bottom left corner during the movement of the paper.
